languages.text: Акт предательства, совершенный Вольным Торговцем, был столь чудовищен, что ужаснул не только людей, но и цивилизацию куда более древнюю. Гробницы некронтир, рассеянные по бесчисленным мирам Простора, явили миру полчища своих бездушных обитателей. Очень скоро то, что еще оставалось от протектората фон Валанциус, превратилось в мертвое, безжизненное поле битвы. Противостояние осколков некогда великой империи и трансцендентального чудовища вновь до основания сотрясло галактику.

The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. The tombs of the Necrontyr, scattered across the countless worlds of the Expanse, revealed hordes of their soulless inhabitants to the galaxy. Soon enough, what was left of the von Valancius protectorate became a dead, lifeless battlefield. The confrontation between the fragments of a once great empire and a transcendental monster shook the galaxy to its core once more.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーの背信行為は、人類だけでなく、遥か古くから存在する文明をも恐怖に陥れるほど巨大なものだった。広大な宇宙に散らばるネクロティルの墓は、無数の魂のない住民を銀河に解放した。やがて、フォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領は、死者の墓場と化した。かつて偉大だった帝国の残骸と、超越的な怪物との対決は、再び銀河を揺るがした。
languages.original_text: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. The tombs of the Necrontyr, scattered across the countless worlds of the Expanse, revealed hordes of their soulless inhabitants to the galaxy. Soon enough, what was left of the von Valancius protectorate became a dead, lifeless battlefield. The confrontation between the fragments of a once great empire and a transcendental monster shook the galaxy to its core once more.

traits.locale_text: ローグトレーダーの背信行為は、人類だけでなく、遥か古くから存在する文明をも恐怖に陥れるほど巨大なものだった。広大な宇宙に散らばるネクロティルの墓は、無数の魂のない住民を銀河に解放した。やがて、フォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領は、死者の墓場と化した。かつて偉大だった帝国の残骸と、超越的な怪物との対決は、再び銀河を揺るがした。

languages.text: 行商浪人的背叛行径是如此骇人听闻，不仅令人类恐惧，也震惊了一个更古老的文明。散布在扩区无数世界中的太空死灵墓穴向银河放出了成群的无魂大军。很快，冯·瓦兰修斯属地残存的领土化作一片死寂的战场。昔日伟大帝国的残部与超凡怪物之间的对抗，再一次深深震撼了整个银河。
languages.original_text: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. The tombs of the Necrontyr, scattered across the countless worlds of the Expanse, revealed hordes of their soulless inhabitants to the galaxy. Soon enough, what was left of the von Valancius protectorate became a dead, lifeless battlefield. The confrontation between the fragments of a once great empire and a transcendental monster shook the galaxy to its core once more.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人的背叛行径是如此骇人听闻，不仅令人类恐惧，也震惊了一个更古老的文明。散布在扩区无数世界中的太空死灵墓穴向银河放出了成群的无魂大军。很快，冯·瓦兰修斯属地残存的领土化作一片死寂的战场。昔日伟大帝国的残部与超凡怪物之间的对抗，再一次深深震撼了整个银河。

languages.text: L'acte de trahison perpétré par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} était si monstrueux qu'il horrifia non seulement les humains, mais aussi une civilisation bien plus ancienne. Les tombeaux des Necrontyrs, éparpillés sur d'innombrables mondes des Étendues, déchaînèrent des hordes de leurs habitants sans âme sur le protectorat von Valancius, qui se transforma en immense champ de bataille sans vie. L'affrontement entre les fragments d'un grand empire déchu et un monstre transcendantal secoua une fois de plus la galaxie.
languages.original_text: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. The tombs of the Necrontyr, scattered across the countless worlds of the Expanse, revealed hordes of their soulless inhabitants to the galaxy. Soon enough, what was left of the von Valancius protectorate became a dead, lifeless battlefield. The confrontation between the fragments of a once great empire and a transcendental monster shook the galaxy to its core once more.

Les tombeaux des Necrontyrs, éparpillés sur d'innombrables mondes des Étendues, déchaînèrent des hordes de leurs habitants sans âme sur le protectorat von Valancius, qui se transforma en immense champ de bataille sans vie. L'affrontement entre les fragments d'un grand empire déchu et un monstre transcendantal secoua une fois de plus la galaxie.

languages.text: La traición de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente fue tan monstruoso que no solo horrorizó a los humanos, sino también a una civilización mucho más antigua. Las tumbas de los Necrontyr, esparcidas por innumerables mundos de la Extensión, se abrieron para liberar a hordas de sus habitantes desalmados por la galaxia. Pronto, los restos del protectorado von Valancius se convirtieron en un campo de batalla yermo. El enfrentamiento entre los fragmentos del que fuera un gran imperio y un monstruo trascendental sacudió la galaxia una vez más.
languages.original_text: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. languages.text: Hür Tacir'in gerçekleştirdiği ihanet o kadar korkunçtu ki sadece insanları değil, çok daha eski bir medeniyeti de dehşete düşürdü. Enginliğin sayısız dünyasına dağılmış Nekrontir mezarları, galaksiye ruhsuz sakinlerinden oluşan orduları saldı. Çok geçmeden von Valancius protektorasından kalanlar ölü, cansız bir savaş alanına dönüştü. Bir zamanların büyük imparatorluğunun parçaları ile aşkın bir canavar arasındaki çatışma, galaksiyi bir kez daha temelinden sarstı.
languages.original_text: The act of treachery perpetrated by the Rogue Trader was so monstrous that it horrified not only humans, but also a civilisation far older. languages.text: Der Verrat {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} war derart monströs, dass er nicht nur die Menschen, sondern auch eine weit ältere Zivilisation entsetzte. Die über zahllose Welten der Ausdehnung verstreuten Gräber der Necrontyr entließen Horden ihrer seelenlosen Bewohner in die Galaxis. Wenig später waren die Überreste des Protektorats derer von Valancius nur noch ein totes Schlachtfeld. Die Konfrontation der Fragmente eines einst mächtigen Imperiums mit einem transzendenten Monster erschütterte die Galaxis einmal mehr bis ins Mark.
